evidence.description: User input is directly concatenated into the system prompt without sanitization or secure delimiters.

results.remediation: Use secure delimiters (e.g., XML tags) and implement prompt injection detection filters.

results.check_name: LLM com acesso irrestrito a ferramentas

evidence.description: Agent adapters are configured to bypass human-in-the-loop approvals for tool execution.

results.remediation: Disable YOLO/bypass modes and implement explicit human approval for destructive or high-risk tool calls.

evidence.description: No content moderation or input length limits are enforced before sending data to LLM providers.

results.remediation: Implement input moderation, rate limiting, and maximum context window constraints.

evidence.description: LLM output is returned raw without sanitization, potentially allowing data exfiltration via malicious markdown/HTML.

results.remediation: Sanitize LLM output to strip external links or images and use output guardrails to prevent system prompt leakage.

results.check_name: Logs de decisão da IA inexistentes

evidence.description: Only technical metadata is logged; structured reasoning and agent decision logs are missing.

results.remediation: Implement structured event sourcing (ESAA) for all agent tool choices and internal reasoning steps.
